messages.text: Hey Alex — your post on event-driven architecture at Stripe was great. I'm Nova from Embedding VC, we back early-stage AI startups and connect top talent. Open to exploring?
Thanks Nova! Yeah I'm always curious what's out there.
Your jump from Google to Stripe is fascinating. What's been keeping you most engaged lately?
